setup_notes: BM25 re-ranking: Okapi BM25 (k1=1.5, b=0.75) applied to top-20 bi-encoder candidates. Bi-encoder: all-MiniLM-L6-v2. Test pairs: query = claim A, target = claim B (15-60% word overlap), candidates = top-20 by bi-encoder for A. Combined score: 50% bi-encoder cosine + 50% BM25. BM25 captures lexical matching to complement semantic embeddings.
